name: Couchdb

aliases.name: Database
aliases.comment: Represents a single database with an address and a database name.

aliases.name: Row
aliases.comment: Row in a view. Contains `.id`, `.key`, and `.value`.

values.name: defineDb
values.comment:
Create a database reference. Note that no communication needs to
take place as the CouchDB protocol is RESTful. Users are not supported
at this time.

    defineDb "localhost:5984" "exampledb" : Database

values.name: fetch
values.comment:
Create a fetch request for a particular document. You must provide 
the decoder for the document and the document id.

    fetch (Json.Decode.field "value" Json.Decode.string) database docId : Request String
values.type: Decoder a -> Database -> String -> Request a

values.name: specialView
values.comment:
Create a request for a view at a particular path as opposed to
within a specific design document. For more view options, see
`Couchdb.View`.

    specialView (Json.Decode.string) docDecoder database "_all_docs" : Request a
values.type: Decoder key -> Decoder value -> Database -> String -> Request (List (Row key value))

values.name: store
values.comment:
Create a request to store a document. Note that you are responsible
for including the revision with your document if this is updating an
already-existing document.
values.type: (a -> Value) -> Database -> String -> a -> Request String

values.name: view
values.comment:
Create a request for a view in a design document. In order to
extract the rows from the response, you must provide a JSON decoder for
the key and for the value. For more view options, see `Couchdb.View`.

    view keyDecoder valueDecoder database designName viewName : Request a
values.type: Decoder key -> Decoder value -> Database -> String -> String -> Request (List (Row key value))

name: Couchdb.View

aliases.name: Options
aliases.type: { key : Maybe String, start_key : Maybe String, end_key : Maybe String }

aliases.name: Row
aliases.comment: Row in a view. Contains `.id`, `.key`, and `.value`.
aliases.type: { id : String, key : key, value : value }

values.name: specialViewWith
values.comment:
Create a request for a view at a particular path with the specified
options.
values.type: Options -> Decoder key -> Decoder value -> Database -> String -> Request (List (Row key value))

values.name: viewWith
values.comment:
Create a request for a view in a design document with the specified
options. In order to extract the rows from the response, you must
provide a JSON decoder for the key and for the value.
values.type: Options -> Decoder key -> Decoder value -> Database -> String -> String -> Request (List (Row key value))
